description: Compare current performance against external benchmarks, industry standards, or internal baselines to contextualize where the organization stands.

question_patterns: how do we compare to industry benchmarks
are we above or below standard
how do we stack up against peers

transformations: compare actual_value against benchmark_value per metric
compute percentile_rank if distribution data available

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics with known industry benchmarks or internal baselines; deprioritize metrics unique to this organization with no comparison point
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should include benchmark_value, benchmark_source (industry/internal/policy), and classification (above/at/below benchmark)
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: not applicable — benchmark analysis is comparative, not causal

penalty_rules: penalize metrics with no available benchmark reference (-0.15)
penalize metrics that are too organization-specific for external comparison (-0.10)
boost_rules: boost metrics with well-known industry benchmarks (+0.10)
boost metrics commonly used in compliance audit reports (+0.08)
boost metrics with historical internal baselines (+0.05)
